stylePrompt: Create a completely original Quiet Luxury lighting product where exceptional material, invisible engineering, and perfect proportion communicate value without visual display. Use restrained silhouettes, seamless joints, concealed light sources, and finely controlled illumination. The lamp should feel expensive to the touch and effortless to the eye, balancing warmth and precision without logos, ostentatious ornament, or trend-driven decoration.
specificElements: A nearly invisible seam between stone and metal
A concealed source creating a floating halo
A slim profile with jewelry-grade edges
A hand-polished control integrated flush into the body
